business_ideas.idea: Card game design emphasizing social player entertainment over game mechanics.
Exploding Kittens and derivative board games with viral growth mechanics.
NFT/collaborative gaming platform built via creative constraint methodology.
Retail game distribution maximizing shelf space efficiency and impulse purchase.
Sports-themed board games (NFL Catchables) leveraging licensing partnerships.

predictions.text: Board games emphasizing player creativity will outperform entertainment-focused designs 10x.
Physical games will remain resilient category as counter to digital fatigue.
Retail shelf space optimization and unique packaging will become primary competitive differentiator.
